tinker.name: Image Compressor
tinker.description: Batch image compression for PNG, JPG, and WebP

zh-CN.name: 图片压缩
zh-CN.description: 批量图片压缩，支持 PNG、JPG 和 WebP

compress_images.description: Compress one or more images end to end: clear the list, load files, apply settings, compress, and save. Internally follows the same steps as the plugin UI.

paths.description: Absolute paths to PNG, JPG, JPEG, or WebP images

quality.description: Compression quality from 1 to 100. Defaults to the current UI setting.

keepExif.description: Preserve EXIF metadata. Defaults to the current UI setting.

overwriteOriginal.description: When true, save overwrites original files. When false, outputDirectory is required.

outputDirectory.description: Absolute path to save compressed images when overwriteOriginal is false.

save.description: Whether to save after compression. Defaults to true.
